title: [P1] WP-11.07 вҖ” Investigate negative startup cost before any configured usage

root_cause.summary: Three related defects could allow negative or misleading zero-state cost to surface at startup.

defect_1.description: The zero-state guard used exact equality `cost_usd == 0.0`.  A tiny negative value produced by float drift (or the second defect) would fail the equality check, fall into the `else` branch, and pass through to format_cost_display() which clamps to zero but returns '~$0.000' instead of the clear 'no charges' string.  Result: startup showed '~$0.000' or, before the format_cost_display clamp was added, a literal negative dollar amount.
defect_1.fix: Changed the guard to only format finite, strictly positive values as dollar amounts.  Any zero, negative, NaN, or infinite value now returns 'no charges', matching acceptance criterion #2.

defect_2.description: The legacy cost path exposed `audio_seconds_sent` and callers added raw deltas directly. A later negative delta could erase already-recorded valid STT usage.
defect_2.fix: Added `SessionMetrics::record_audio_seconds_sent()` and switched the main and pipeline accumulation paths to it. The helper ignores non-positive or non-finite deltas before they can offset valid usage; `recalculate_cost()` still clamps as a defense-in-depth guard.

defect_3.description: The live CostCounter path added raw audio deltas to the cumulative counter. A later negative delta could erase previously recorded valid STT usage before final cost calculation.
defect_3.fix: Added a shared `billable_audio_seconds()` guard and made `CostCounter::record_audio_seconds()` ignore non-positive or non-finite deltas before accumulation. `total_usd()` still uses the same guard as a defense-in-depth clamp.

criterion_1_no_negative_cost_at_startup.evidence: Both CostCounter::record_audio_seconds() and SessionMetrics::record_audio_seconds_sent() reject invalid/negative deltas before accumulation, and their final calculation paths keep defense-in-depth clamps. Both paths are tested.

criterion_2_clear_zero_state_string.evidence: format_cost_or_zero_state(0.0) and format_cost_or_zero_state(-0.13) both return 'no charges'.  Snapshots snapshot__status_strip_zero_state_narrow and snapshot__status_strip_zero_state_expanded confirm the TUI shows 'no charges' at startup.

criterion_3_release_path_fix.evidence: The fix is in the shared format helper (cost.rs) used by all display surfaces, and both metrics accumulation paths reject invalid/negative audio deltas before summing.

criterion_4_runtime_evidence.evidence: Real startup launch evidence is recorded in runtime-startup-summary.txt and runtime-startup-onboarding-stdout.txt. The captured TUI shows 'no charges', with no negative dollar amount and no '~$0.000'.

test_results.zero_state_negative_cost_returns_no_char: PASS вҖ” format_cost_or_zero_state(-0.13) == 'no charges' (regression guard for issue #195 example value)
test_results.recalculate_cost_clamps_negative_to_zero: PASS вҖ” SessionMetrics with audio_seconds_sent=-325.0 recalculates to estimated_cost_usd=0.0 (defense-in-depth guard)
test_results.negative_audio_seconds_do_not_offset_pos: PASS вҖ” CostCounter keeps a valid 100s STT charge plus 10,000 translated chars after an anomalous -325s delta
test_results.non_finite_audio_seconds_are_ignored_bef: PASS вҖ” CostCounter ignores NaN and infinite audio deltas before accumulation
test_results.recalculate_cost_negative_audio_does_not: PASS вҖ” SessionMetrics with a direct negative aggregate plus 10,000 translated chars returns 0.2 USD
test_results.record_audio_seconds_sent_ignores_negati: PASS вҖ” SessionMetrics keeps a valid 100s STT duration after an anomalous -325s delta
test_results.record_audio_seconds_sent_ignores_non_fi: PASS вҖ” SessionMetrics ignores NaN and infinite audio deltas before accumulation
test_results.snapshot_status_strip_zero_state_narrow: PASS вҖ” rendered strip at 60 cols shows 'no charges'
test_results.snapshot_status_strip_zero_state_expande: PASS вҖ” rendered expanded metrics shows 'Cost: no charges'
test_results.runtime_startup_launch: PASS вҖ” launched target/debug/tui-translator.exe with a temp USERPROFILE and no configured usage; captured TUI shows 'no charges', no negative dollar amount, no '~$0.000', and no panic/abort
test_results.total_tests_run: cargo test passed: 244 unit/integration tests, 1 soak fixture test, 2 soak runner tests, and 3 WASAPI probe tests; 0 failed

tui_rendered_zero_state.note: Captured from insta snapshot assertions.  All three surfaces show 'no charges' not '~$0.000'.

changes: CostCounterState::total_usd: clamps negative audio seconds before summing with MT/TTS costs
CostCounter::record_audio_seconds: ignores non-positive and non-finite deltas before they can offset accumulated valid usage
format_cost_or_zero_state: guard condition changed from `cost_usd == 0.0` to finite and strictly positive to catch zero, negative, NaN, and infinite values
Updated doc-comment with expanded examples including -0.13
SessionMetrics::record_audio_seconds_sent: ignores non-positive and non-finite deltas before they can offset accumulated valid usage
SessionMetrics::recalculate_cost: defense-in-depth clamp for negative aggregate values
Uses SessionMetrics::record_audio_seconds_sent() instead of directly adding raw audio deltas
Uses SessionMetrics::record_audio_seconds_sent() instead of directly adding raw audio deltas

commands_run: rustup run 1.90.0-x86_64-pc-windows-gnu cargo test  [PASS: 244 unit/integration + 1 soak + 2 soak runner + 3 WASAPI probe]
target/debug/tui-translator.exe launched with a temporary USERPROFILE and no configured usage for 4 seconds  [PASS: 'no charges' visible; no negative dollar amount; no '~$0.000'; no panic/abort]
